untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition for 'Adam & Eve Double Top' requires identifying two distinct peaks with specific morphological characteristics (narrow one-day spike for Adam, wider rounded peak for Eve, and confirmation line/neckline). This requires multi-bar pattern detection and peak identification logic not expressible with single-bar indicators and simple comparisons. The 'confirmation line' (neckline) between peaks is a derived structural element that cannot be computed from the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using upper_wick as proxy for narrow spike morphology and pivot as neckline proxy, but this is insufficient. Full pattern requires: (1) historical peak detection across 5-10 bars, (2) peak width/shape analysis, (3) dynamic neckline calculation between two peaks. Author does not specify exit stop placement rules ('AUTHOR_SILENT'), so reversal above pivot was used as fallback exit. Success rate in bear market: 72%, average decline: 19%.
